channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Learn How Much You Could Receive for a Loan Repayment Award
item.description: Planning to apply for an Extramural Loan Repayment Programs (LRP) Award? NIH has relaunched the LRP Award Calculator, a quick and easy tool that provides an estimate of your potential LRP award amount.  Simply enter your total qualifying educational loan debt and your annual income to see what you may be eligible to receive.

item.title: Stay Informed About NIH Grants Policy and Processes
item.description: Follow these tips to keep tabs on the latest NIH policies, processes, and resources to help as you develop your application or manage your award.

item.title: Promethean Clay
item.description: DARPA is soliciting proposals for new and innovative energy storage systems. Proposed research should investigate approaches that enable revolutionary advances in energy storage at scales relevant to systems integration. | See Program

item.title: Notice of Change: Expiration of PAR-25-090 -- NIDDK High Risk Multi-Center Clinical Study Implementation Planning Cooperative Agreements (U34 Clinical Trial Optional)
item.description: Notice NOT-DK-26-102 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Turning proteins into PROSE
item.description: The PROtein SEquencing (PROSE) program launches to build microsystems that directly read and decipher complex proteins.

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration of PAR-25-099, "Planning for Product Development Strategy (R34 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-006 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration of PAR-25-330, "Role of Defective Proviruses in HIV Persistence (R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-007 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration of PAR-25-300, "Targeting Cell Surface HIV Envelope for Cell Elimination (R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-008 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration of PAR-25-316 "Elucidating Immunometabolic Responses to HIV Infection that Increase TB or HBV Risk (R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-009 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration of PAR-25-315, "Elucidating Immunometabolic Responses to HIV Infection that Increase TB or HBV Risk (R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-AI-26-010 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NIA Intervention Testing Program (ITP) Announces Annual Call for Compounds to Test for Lifespan Extension in Mice
item.description: Notice NOT-AG-25-014 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Reminder of Requirement for Certification of IRB Approval
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-043 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: National Museum of the U.S. Air Force to host DARPA Lift Challenge
item.description: The outdoor competition, including the final flyoff and awards ceremony on Aug. 9, will be open to the public.

item.title: Not such a long shot
item.description: The X‑68A completed a series of technical milestones, moving its air-launched uninhabited vehicle closer to flight test.
